parameters.name: since
parameters.value: ={{ (function(){ var d=new Date(); var day=d.getUTCDay(); var diff=day===0?6:day-1; d.setUTCDate(d.getUTCDate()-diff-7); d.setUTCHours(0,0,0,0); return d.toISOString(); })() }}

parameters.url: ={{ $env.SUPABASE_URL + '/rest/v1/pr_analyses?analyzed_at=gte.' + (function(){ var d=new Date(); var day=d.getUTCDay(); var diff=day===0?6:day-1; d.setUTCDate(d.getUTCDate()-diff-7); d.setUTCHours(0,0,0,0); return d.toISOString(); })() }}

nodes.name: Generate AI Summary
nodes.notes: ANTHROPIC (active). For OpenAI: change url, replace x-api-key with Authorization: Bearer $env.OPENAI_API_KEY, use model gpt-4o-mini.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 2048, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.system_prompt + '\n\n' + $json.user_prompt }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ week_start: $json.week_start, week_end: $json.week_end, total_prs: $json.total_prs, total_issues: $json.total_issues, total_commits: $json.total_commits, high_risk_prs: $json.high_risk_prs, p0_p1_bugs: $json.p0_p1_bugs, digest_markdown: $json.digest_markdown }) }}
